title: EDEN wire — emit policy_error request
description: Body for POST /v0/experiments/{E}/policy-errors (07-wire-protocol.md §2.10). Orchestrators-group-gated. The endpoint appends a single experiment.policy_error event (05-event-protocol.md §3.4) and is exempt from the §2 transactional invariant — no protocol-owned state mutation pairs with it. additionalProperties: false rejects unknown keys; the server appends the event verbatim from the supplied fields.

policy_kind.description: Identifies which policy kind raised. v0 defines 'termination'; future decision types that introduce policy callables MAY add new values.

error_type.description: The exception class name; free-form per implementation language.
